loan_contract_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no as loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract as begining_of_contract , extract ( day from ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) ) as begin_day , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'MONTH') as begin_month , extract ( year from ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) ) + 543 as begin_year , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as memname , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no as membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount as loan_approve_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ) as loan_approve_amount_thai , si_security_user.user_name as user_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name as managername , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.manager_name FROM sc_lon_m_contract, si_security_user, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer = si_security_user.user_id AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no AND sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'พ65000013'

r_amnat_com_special_loan_guarantee_nest_.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) as memname_guarantor , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name as add_guarantor , sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone as tel_guarantor FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_member_address WHERE 1 = 2 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = 'พ65000013' ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no
